message:
Fail build:skill when prerequisites are missing

The script now validates that per-page markdown files exist in dist/
before generating, instead of silently producing incomplete output.

Also:
- Rename generate:skill to build:skill (it's a post-build step)
- Update CLAUDE.md with build:skill documentation
- Fix build output directory in docs (/build -> dist/)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ import ParsingOptions from '@partials/operators/ParsingOptions.mdx';
 - Use `bun run dev` to start a development server in the background for live
   preview during development.
 - Use `bun run build` only when you need to inspect build artifacts. Output goes
-  to `/build`.
+  to `dist/`.
 
 ### Generated Content
 
@@ -85,6 +85,9 @@ Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
   `bun run generate:ocsf:all` for all versions. Fetches schema from schema.ocsf.io
   and articles from ocsf/ocsf-docs. Generated files: `src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/`,
   `src/sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts`, `src/ocsf-version.mjs`.
+- **Agent Skill**: Run `bun run build:skill` to generate the Tenzir agent skill.
+  Requires `bun run build:full` first to generate per-page markdown files in `dist/`.
+  Generated files: `tenzir/SKILL.md`, `tenzir/references/`.
 
 ### Linting

@@ -215,9 +215,9 @@ jobs:
             done
           } > tenzir-docs.md
 
-      - name: Generate skill
+      - name: Build skill
         run: |
-          bun run generate:skill
+          bun run build:skill
           tar -czf tenzir-skill.tar.gz -C tenzir .
 
       - name: Install uv

@@ -16,7 +16,6 @@
     "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --map",
     "generate:docs-bundle": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --full",
     "generate:excalidraw": "node scripts/generate-excalidraw-svgs.mjs",
-    "generate:skill": "node scripts/generate-skill.mjs",
     "generate:excalidraw:placeholders": "node scripts/generate-placeholder-svgs.mjs",
     "sync:openapi": "bash scripts/sync-openapi.sh",
     "lint": "bun run lint:markdown && bun run lint:eslint && bun run lint:prettier",
@@ -28,6 +27,7 @@
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write .",
     "build:linkcheck": "CHECK_LINKS=true bun run build",
     "build:full": "bun run generate && CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true bun run build",
+    "build:skill": "node scripts/generate-skill.mjs",
     "lint:fix": "bun run lint:markdown:fix && bun run lint:eslint:fix && bun run lint:prettier:fix",
     "postinstall": "node scripts/fix-starlight-llms-txt.js"
   },
